prompt: Create a high-key studio beauty portrait of a young East Asian woman, framed from upper torso to head, looking directly into the camera with a gentle closed-mouth smile. She has dark brown long softly wavy hair styled half-up with airy curtain bangs and a few loose strands around the face, clear fair skin with natural rosy blush, glossy peach-pink lips, subtle eyeliner, long lashes, and warm brown eyes. Her left hand is raised gracefully to her cheek with relaxed fingers, creating a soft beauty-ad pose. She wears a simple white sleeveless sheer chiffon blouse over a camisole, minimal jewelry, no visible logos. Use a clean warm off-white studio background with abundant negative space on the right, soft diffused frontal lighting, very gentle shadows, smooth retouched skin, bright commercial Japanese cosmetics photography style, realistic proportions, shallow depth of field, crisp eyes, natural texture, polished post-processed look. Vertical square crop, face positioned slightly left of center, shoulders angled subtly, calm elegant atmosphere.
promptEn: Create a high-key studio beauty portrait of a young East Asian woman, framed from upper torso to head, looking directly into the camera with a gentle closed-mouth smile. She has dark brown long softly wavy hair styled half-up with airy curtain bangs and a few loose strands around the face, clear fair skin with natural rosy blush, glossy peach-pink lips, subtle eyeliner, long lashes, and warm brown eyes. Her left hand is raised gracefully to her cheek with relaxed fingers, creating a soft beauty-ad pose. She wears a simple white sleeveless sheer chiffon blouse over a camisole, minimal jewelry, no visible logos. Use a clean warm off-white studio background with abundant negative space on the right, soft diffused frontal lighting, very gentle shadows, smooth retouched skin, bright commercial Japanese cosmetics photography style, realistic proportions, shallow depth of field, crisp eyes, natural texture, polished post-processed look. Vertical square crop, face positioned slightly left of center, shoulders angled subtly, calm elegant atmosphere.
promptZh: 创作一张高调摄影棚美妆人像，拍摄一位年轻的东亚女性，取景范围从上半身到头部，她正视镜头，嘴角带着温柔的微笑。她留着 深棕色 的长发，发丝呈现柔和的波浪卷，半扎发造型，搭配空气感八字刘海，脸颊两侧散落几缕发丝。皮肤白皙透亮，带有自然的红润气色，涂抹水润的桃粉色唇釉，眼线精致，睫毛纤长，拥有一双温暖的棕色眼眸。她的左手优雅地抬起轻触脸颊，手指放松，呈现出柔和的美妆姿势。她穿着一件简单的 白色 无袖透明雪纺衫，内搭吊带，佩戴极简首饰，无明显标志。使用干净的暖米白色摄影棚背景，右侧留有充足的负空间，采用柔和的正面漫射光，阴影非常细腻，皮肤质感平滑，呈现明亮的日系商业美妆摄影风格，比例真实，浅景深，眼神清晰，纹理自然，后期处理精致。竖向方形构图，脸部位于中心偏左位置，肩膀微微倾斜，营造出宁静优雅的氛围。
